svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="三层降级链路" id="ssr2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-157" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="req" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="用户请求" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="390" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="正常：SSR 实例渲染
Nginx 探活全绿，实时渲染返回" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="360" x="310" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="req" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="l1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="一级降级：Nginx 摘除故障节点
单实例挂了 → 摘除，流量转健康实例
用户无感" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="360" x="310" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="l1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="l2" value="单实例故障"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="二级降级：切 CSR 模式
所有实例慢（>3s）→ 返回空 HTML + 客户端渲染
页面能开，首屏慢但内容在" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="360" x="310" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="l2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="l3" value="全实例异常"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="三级降级：静态兜底页
Nginx rewrite 到 CDN 静态页
「服务维护中」，绝不白屏" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="360" x="310" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="l3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="l4" value="CSR 也挂"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="每一级降级都是「保内容降体验」：能渲染就渲染，渲染不了就客户端渲染，客户端也崩就给静态页。底线是不白屏。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="780" x="100" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 22px; margin-left: 291px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 87px; margin-left: 211px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
正常：SSR 实例渲染
Nginx 探活全绿，实时渲染返回

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 187px; margin-left: 211px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
一级降级：Nginx 摘除故障节点
单实例挂了 → 摘除，流量转健康实例
用户无感

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 287px; margin-left: 211px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
二级降级：切 CSR 模式
所有实例慢（>3s）→ 返回空 HTML + 客户端渲染
页面能开，首屏慢但内容在

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 387px; margin-left: 211px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
三级降级：静态兜底页
Nginx rewrite 到 CDN 静态页
「服务维护中」，绝不白屏

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 477px; margin-left: 390px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 每一级降级都是「保内容降体验」：能渲染就渲染，渲染不了就客户端渲染，客户端也崩就给静态页。底线是不白屏。
